name: Cranberry Fruit Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in the shortening until well combined.
3. Combine the orange peel, juice, and egg. Add to the dry ingredients, mixing just enough to moisten.
4. Fold in the cranberries and nuts.
5. Turn into a greased 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes.
7. Cool, wrap, and store overnight before slicing.
